title: Doff Orchid Drip Feed – 10x30ml Bottles Fast-Acting Plant Food for Healthy Growth of Orchids & Flowering Plants – Nutrient Enriched Plant Feed – Encourages Root Development
features: VERSATILE PLANT FEED – Boost the health and beauty of orchid plants with Doff Orchid Drip Feed. Enriched with solubilised mineral nutrients, this fast-acting fertiliser promotes healthier, stronger plants in outdoor and indoor flowering plants

BOOST GROWTH & RESILIENCE – Each drip feeder delivers a balanced plant food formula to strengthen roots, encourage flowering, and promote healthy plant development. Insert this slow-release garden fertiliser tube into moistened soil for consistent nutrient delivery, replacing every 15 days

EASY-TO-USE FORMULA – This orchid feed is supplied in a ready-to-use bottle for quick and practical application. Whether nurturing delicate orchids or ornamental plants, Doff’s fertiliser saves time and effort, offering professional results with minimal fuss

RELIABLE & EFFECTIVE RESULTS – This high-quality liquid flower feed provides gradual, balanced nutrition for lush and thriving plants year-round. Ideal for indoor orchids and flowering plants, a pack of 10 tubes provides 150 days of nutrient feed, supporting flourishing growth in plants

NOURISHING PLANT FEED – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted feeds and straight solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering effective and complete nutritional plant food to help your garden grow
